  "findings": [
    "Breaker and conductor ampacity mismatch detected during inspection",
    "Conductor is inadequately protected by the overcurrent protective device"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace the overcurrent protective device with one matching the conductor's allowable ampacity",
    "Alternatively, replace the conductors with a size matching the breaker rating and termination temperature limits"
  ],
  "rationale": "The field condition reveals a breaker/conductor ampacity mismatch. Under NEC 240 and 110.14(C), conductors must be protected against overcurrent in accordance with their ampacities, taking into account termination temperature ratings. Because the current installation violates these safety standards and poses a fire/overload hazard, it fails inspection.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 240",
    "NEC 110.14(C)"
  ]
}
